name: Venomous Snake
description: Small, fast, and carrying enough poison to ruin your week. Defensive, not aggressive.

sensory.sight: a coil of something that isn't a stick, perfectly still until it moves very fast
sensory.sound: a dry rattle or hiss, coming from below eye level
sensory.smell: nothing — snakes are scentless until they bite
sensory.feel: a sudden sharp pain, then heat spreading from the wound

encounter_hooks: a shed skin draped over a warm rock
a companion's horse shying at something in the grass
a nest of eggs tucked under a fallen log
notes: Snakes aren't encounters — they're hazards. Step in the wrong place, reach into the wrong hole. The real danger is the poison, not the bite.
